events.title: Berkeley Startup Fair 2026
events.organizer: Berkeley SkyDeck, Berkeley Haas Entrepreneurship Program
events.location: Haas School of Business, UC Berkeley Campus
events.description: An annual event connecting UC Berkeley startups with students, investors, and industry professionals. Features networking and showcases.

events.title: ASUC Town Hall Meeting
events.organizer: Associated Students of the University of California (ASUC)
events.location: Pauley Ballroom, MLK Student Union, UC Berkeley Campus
events.description: A forum for students to engage with ASUC representatives on campus issues and initiatives.

events.title: Cal Men's Basketball vs. Arizona State
events.description: The Cal Golden Bears men's basketball team faces Arizona State in a Pac-12 conference matchup.

events.title: Chemical Sciences Seminar: Advances in Quantum Chemistry
events.location: Pitzer Auditorium, Latimer Hall, UC Berkeley Campus
events.description: Weekly seminar featuring cutting-edge research in quantum chemistry.

events.title: CS @ Berkeley Tech Talk: Quantum Computing Fundamentals
events.organizer: UC Berkeley Department of Electrical Engineering and Computer Sciences (EECS)
events.description: A technical talk exploring the foundational principles and future applications of quantum computing.

events.title: Cal Men's Baseball vs. Stanford
events.description: The Cal Golden Bears baseball team takes on rival Stanford in a weekend series opener.

events.title: Cal Women's Softball vs. Oregon
events.description: The Cal Golden Bears softball team plays a home game against the Oregon Ducks.

events.title: Jane Austen & Camp Criticism | A Talk by Professor Wendy Anne Lee
events.description: Professor Wendy Anne Lee (NYU) discusses Jane Austen and Camp Criticism.

events.title: SCET Collider Series: Venture Capital Trends 2026
events.location: California Memorial Stadium, SCET SkyDeck, UC Berkeley Campus
events.description: Industry leaders discuss the latest trends and outlook in venture capital for the coming year.

events.title: CDSS Data Science Lecture Series: Ethical AI in Healthcare
events.organizer: College of Computing, Data Science, and Society (CDSS)
events.location: BIDS, Hearst Field Annex, UC Berkeley Campus
events.description: A lecture exploring the ethical considerations and societal impact of artificial intelligence in healthcare applications.

events.title: International Student Welcome Mixer
events.description: A social event for new and returning international students to connect and build community.

events.title: BIDS Data Science Workshop: Introduction to Machine Learning with Python
events.location: Hearst Field Annex, UC Berkeley Campus
events.description: A hands-on workshop covering fundamental machine learning concepts and practical implementation using Python.

events.title: Cal Women's Lacrosse vs. UC Davis
events.location: California Memorial Stadium, UC Berkeley Campus
events.description: The Cal Golden Bears women's lacrosse team competes against UC Davis.

events.title: COE Dean's Distinguished Lecture: Future of Sustainable Engineering
events.location: Banatao Auditorium, Sutardja Dai Hall, UC Berkeley Campus
events.description: A distinguished lecture series focusing on innovations and challenges in sustainable engineering.

events.title: Kronos Quartet Concert
events.description: The acclaimed Kronos Quartet performs a program of contemporary and classic works.

events.title: Haas Entrepreneurship Panel: Founders' Journeys
events.organizer: Haas School of Business, UC Berkeley
events.location: Chou Hall, Haas School of Business, UC Berkeley Campus
events.description: Successful alumni founders share their entrepreneurial experiences and insights.

events.title: iSchool Colloquium Series: Privacy in the Digital Age
events.organizer: UC Berkeley School of Information (I School)
events.location: South Hall, I School, UC Berkeley Campus
events.description: A colloquium discussing critical issues and future directions in digital privacy and data protection.

events.title: Campus Job Fair: Spring 2026
events.location: Zellerbach Hall Lobby, UC Berkeley Campus
events.description: An opportunity for students to connect with employers offering internships and full-time positions.

events.title: Law School Faculty Workshop: Climate Law and Policy
events.location: Boalt Hall, School of Law, UC Berkeley Campus
events.description: Faculty present and discuss ongoing research in climate change law and environmental policy.

events.title: CITRIS Research Symposium: AI for Social Good
events.location: Banatao Auditorium, Sutardja Dai Hall, UC Berkeley Campus
events.description: A symposium showcasing interdisciplinary research on using AI technologies to address societal challenges.

events.title: BAMPFA Film Series: Classic French Cinema (Truffaut Retrospective)
events.organizer: Berkeley Art Museum and Pacific Film Archive (BAMPFA)
events.location: BAMPFA Theater, 2155 Center Street, Berkeley, CA
events.description: A screening from the retrospective series dedicated to the works of French director François Truffaut.

events.title: UC Berkeley Intramural Soccer Finals
events.description: The culminating matches of the Spring 2026 Intramural Soccer League.

events.title: Blum Center Social Impact Pitch Competition
events.description: Student teams pitch innovative solutions for global development and social impact to a panel of judges.

events.title: Public Health Grand Rounds: Global Health Disparities
events.organizer: UC Berkeley School of Public Health
events.description: Monthly grand rounds addressing pressing issues and research in global health equity.

events.title: Student Org Leadership Workshop: Effective Team Management
events.location: Tan Kah Kee Hall, UC Berkeley Campus
events.description: A workshop designed for student organization leaders to enhance their team management and leadership skills.

events.title: Lunch Poems: Tonya Foster
events.location: Morrison Library (Doe Library), UC Berkeley Campus
events.description: Berkeley's acclaimed noontime poetry series presents poet Tonya Foster.

events.title: CLTC Cybersecurity Seminar: Future of Digital Privacy
events.location: South Hall, CLTC, UC Berkeley Campus
events.description: A seminar discussing emerging threats and innovations in protecting digital privacy and data security.

events.title: GSPP Policy Seminar: Affordable Housing Solutions
events.location: Room 250, Goldman School of Public Policy, UC Berkeley Campus
events.description: A policy seminar focusing on innovative strategies and challenges in developing affordable housing.

events.title: Cal Track & Field Invitational
events.description: UC Berkeley hosts an invitational track and field meet with collegiate teams.

events.title: UC Berkeley Music Department Concert: Spring Chamber Music Showcase
events.description: Student ensembles from the Music Department perform a diverse program of chamber music.

events.title: E-Lab Startup Incubator Info Session
events.location: Memorial Stadium, E-Lab, UC Berkeley Campus
events.description: An information session for students interested in joining the E-Lab startup incubator program.

events.title: Innovative Genomics Institute (IGI) Public Lecture: CRISPR and Gene Editing Ethics
events.description: A public lecture addressing the scientific advancements and ethical considerations of CRISPR gene editing technology.

events.title: RDI Research Talk: Digital Humanities and AI
events.location: Doe Library, Research Data Initiative, UC Berkeley Campus
events.description: A research presentation on the intersection of digital humanities and artificial intelligence in academic research.

events.title: Graduate Student Social Hour
events.location: Durant Hall Lounge, UC Berkeley Campus
events.description: A casual gathering for graduate students to network and socialize.

events.title: Haas Energy Institute Seminar: Renewable Energy Economics
events.organizer: Energy Institute at Haas, UC Berkeley
events.location: Haas School of Business, UC Berkeley Campus
events.description: A seminar focusing on economic aspects and market dynamics of renewable energy systems.

events.title: UC Berkeley Theatre, Dance & Performance Studies: Student Choreography Showcase
events.organizer: UC Berkeley Department of Theatre, Dance & Performance Studies
events.description: A showcase of original choreographic works by UC Berkeley dance students.

events.title: Cal Women's Beach Volleyball vs. UCLA
events.location: Clark Kerr Campus Beach Volleyball Courts, Berkeley, CA
events.description: The Cal Golden Bears women's beach volleyball team competes against UCLA.

events.title: SCET Scaling Your Startup Workshop
events.location: Sutardja Dai Hall, UC Berkeley Campus
events.description: A workshop focused on strategies and challenges in scaling early-stage startup ventures.

events.title: SSL Space Science Colloquium: Exploring Exoplanets with Webb Telescope
events.location: Space Sciences Lab, UC Berkeley Campus
events.description: A colloquium discussing recent discoveries and observational techniques for exoplanets using the James Webb Space Telescope.

events.title: Simons Institute Research Symposium: Theoretical Foundations of Machine Learning
events.organizer: Simons Institute for the Theory of Computing
events.location: Calvin Lab, Simons Institute, UC Berkeley Campus
events.description: An all-day symposium exploring advanced theoretical aspects and foundational principles of machine learning.

events.title: UC Berkeley Cultural Festival
events.description: A vibrant celebration of the diverse cultures within the UC Berkeley community, featuring performances, food, and exhibits.

events.title: Blum Center Lecture: Innovation for Global Poverty Alleviation
events.description: A lecture series focusing on innovative approaches and research aimed at addressing global poverty.

events.title: Botanical Garden Workshop: Nature Sketching for Beginners
events.description: A guided workshop to learn basic sketching techniques inspired by the diverse plant collections.

events.title: Cal Men's Water Polo vs. Pacific
events.location: Spieker Aquatics Complex, UC Berkeley Campus
events.description: The Cal Golden Bears men's water polo team hosts a game against Pacific.

events.title: ITS Berkeley Transportation Tech Showcase
events.location: Richmond Field Station, UC Berkeley (Berkeley affiliated)
events.description: Showcase of cutting-edge transportation research and technology innovations from ITS Berkeley.

events.title: Graduate Division Professional Development Workshop: Grant Writing for PhD Students
events.description: A workshop offering strategies and tips for PhD students on writing successful grant proposals.

events.title: DeCal Fair Spring 2026
events.location: Upper Sproul Plaza, UC Berkeley Campus
events.description: An opportunity for students to explore student-led courses offered through the DeCal program.

events.title: Berkeley Angels Network Demo Day
events.location: Haas School of Business, UC Berkeley Campus
events.description: Startup founders present their ventures to angel investors and the Berkeley community.

events.title: Alvin Ailey American Dance Theater
events.description: The renowned modern dance company performs a program of classic and new works.

events.title: Campus Recreation Fitness Marathon
events.location: Recreational Sports Facility (RSF), UC Berkeley Campus
events.description: An all-day event featuring various fitness classes and activities for the campus community.

events.title: EECS Research Review Day
events.organizer: UC Berkeley Department of Electrical Engineering and Computer Sciences (EECS)
events.description: An annual event showcasing research projects and innovations from the EECS department.

events.title: 2026 May Ziadeh Distinguished Lecture in Palestinian & Arab Studies
events.organizer: UC Berkeley's Palestinian & Arab Studies Program
events.location: 315 Maude Fife Room, Wheeler Hall, UC Berkeley Campus
events.description: Annual distinguished lecture featuring award-winning poet, essayist, and translator Lena Khalaf Tuffaha.

events.title: Wellness Wednesday: Yoga & Mindfulness Session
events.location: Sproul Hall Lawn, UC Berkeley Campus
events.description: A mid-week session focused on promoting mental and physical well-being through yoga and mindfulness.

events.title: BAMPFA Art Talk: Curator's Tour - New Acquisitions
events.organizer: Berkeley Art Museum and Pacific Film Archive (BAMPFA)
events.location: BAMPFA Galleries, 2155 Center Street, Berkeley, CA
events.description: A guided tour by a BAMPFA curator highlighting recent additions to the museum's art collection.

events.title: Energy Institute @ Haas: Cleantech Entrepreneurship Summit
events.organizer: Energy Institute at Haas, UC Berkeley
events.location: Haas School of Business, UC Berkeley Campus
events.description: An all-day summit bringing together innovators, investors, and policymakers in the cleantech sector.

events.title: Student Volunteer Day: Campus Cleanup
events.organizer: UC Berkeley Office of Student Affairs
events.location: Various Campus Locations, UC Berkeley Campus
events.description: Students, faculty, and staff come together to beautify the campus.

events.title: Berkeley AI Policy Initiative Workshop: Regulating AI for Public Safety
events.description: A workshop discussing policy frameworks and regulatory challenges for ensuring public safety in the age of AI.

events.title: UC Berkeley Art Practice Exhibition Opening: MFA Thesis Exhibition
events.organizer: UC Berkeley Department of Art Practice
events.location: Worth Ryder Art Gallery, Kroeber Hall, UC Berkeley Campus
events.description: Opening reception for the annual Master of Fine Arts thesis exhibition, showcasing new works by graduating students.

events.title: Blockchain @ Berkeley Hackathon Kick-off
events.description: The kick-off event for Blockchain @ Berkeley's annual hackathon, bringing together developers to build decentralized applications.
